strategy: Join on time. Late wizards eat a Star Mana Burn that pierces all resist and deals 500.
She summons a Clockworker on Round 1. Clear it with an AoE or ignore it and focus Lucia — she only has 3,335 health.
At the start of every fourth round she steals ALL your blades and wards. Land your hit inside the first three rounds so nothing gets stolen.
Do not Feint her — she Cleanse Wards all harmful wards off herself. Do not trap her either — a trap makes her buff her whole team with a blade, accuracy, spear, and heal.
Rely on self-blades only, then burst her down before the Round 4 steal window.
cheatNotes: Join on time or you eat a 500 Star Mana Burn that ignores your resist.
She summons a Clockworker on Round 1, and more if 3+ wizards are present. Plan to AoE or just race her low health.
At the start of every fourth round she steals every blade and ward off your whole team. Hit before Round 4 (and before Round 8) so nothing is stolen.
Feinting her is wasted — she cleanses all harmful wards off herself.
Trapping her backfires: she buffs her entire team with a +30% blade, +20% accuracy, +10% spear, and +30% heal. Use self-blades instead.
